name: codefit_ai.js
description: ${DarkMode} Devs' online AI bootcamp — root workspace for the Vite client and Express server.
author: Fernando Trejo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,emulators -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w client" "firebase emulators:start --only functions,auth,firestore"
scripts.dev:legacy: concurrently -n client,server -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w client" "npm run watch -w server"
